asd_site_testimonials.quote: ASD turned around our GA drawings within 3 business days. Accurate, clean drawings with no back-and-forth required.
asd_site_testimonials.name: Mark T.
Jason W.
asd_site_testimonials.quote: The level of detail in their shop drawings saved us at least two weeks on site. They really understand what fabricators need.
Consistent, accurate and always responsive when we need revisions. ASD is our go-to detailing team for every project.
asd_site_testimonials.name: Sarah L.

asd_portfolio.title: Boronia Station — Melbourne BIG BUILD
asd_portfolio.desc: The Boronia Station upgrade required comprehensive structural steel detailing across multiple construction phases, with detailed modelling, general arrangement drawings and fabrication documentation delivered to support the integration of new steelwork with existing station infrastructure. Close coordination with multiple stakeholders and tight scheduling around station closures necessitated efficient RFI management and rapid drawing turnaround to maintain program critical dates. Detailing services encompassed connection design, code compliance verification and constructability reviews to ensure seamless execution within the constraints of the operational rail environment.

asd_portfolio.title: North-East Link - Stairs
asd_portfolio.desc: 3D modelling and complete documentation package for a dual-occupancy residential development including all connection details.
Large-span industrial warehouse with mezzanine floor. Full fabrication drawings, RFI management and issued-for-construction package.
asd_portfolio.title: Industrial Warehouse Structure — Dandenong South
Portal Frame Factory — Sunshine, VIC
asd_portfolio.desc: Steel portal frame design documentation for a manufacturing facility including crane beams, column bases and bracing details.

asd_portfolio.title: 3-Storey Townhouse Complex — Carlton, VIC
asd_portfolio.desc: Structural steel detailing for a 3-storey townhouse development. Coordinated with LGS frame and precast panel elements.

asd_portfolio.title: Commercial Office Fitout — Docklands, VIC
asd_portfolio.desc: Steel detailing for a commercial office fitout including feature staircases, mezzanine structures and architectural steel elements.

asd_site_services.title: Structural Steel Modelling
asd_site_services.desc: Precision 3D modelling of structural steel frameworks using Tekla Structures for residential, commercial and industrial projects.
